result.preview:
"Postgres query exectution error (ProgrammingError): (psycopg2.errors.UndefinedFunction) operator does not exist: text >= date
LINE 8:     AND createddate >= DATE '2023-05-02'
                            ^
HINT:  No operator matches the given name and argument types. You might need to add explicit type casts.

[SQL: WITH base_cases AS (
  SELECT id AS case_id,
         ownerid AS close_owner_id,
         createddate,
         closeddate
  FROM "Case"
  WHERE closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND createddate >= DATE '2023-05-02'
    AND createddate < DATE '2023-09-02'
), owner_assignments AS (
  SELECT caseid__c AS case_id,
         COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE field__c = 'Owner') AS owner_change_events
  FROM casehistory__c
  GROUP BY caseid__c
), not_transferred_cases AS (
  SELECT b.*
  FROM base_cases b
  LEFT JOIN owner_assignments oa ON oa.case_id = b.case_id
  WHERE COALESCE(oa.owner_change_events, 0) <= 1
), per_agent AS (
  SELECT close_owner_id AS agent_id,
         COUNT(*) AS cases_closed,
         AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closeddate - createddate))) AS avg_handle_seconds
  FROM not_transferred_cases
  GROUP BY close_owner_id
  HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
)
SELECT agent_id
FROM per_agent
ORDER BY avg_handle_seconds ASC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 1;]
(Background on this error at: https://sqlalche.me/e/20/f405)"

args.query:
WITH base_cases AS (
  SELECT id AS case_id,
         ownerid AS close_owner_id,
         createddate,
         closeddate
  FROM "Case"
  WHERE closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND createddate >= DATE '2023-05-02'
    AND createddate < DATE '2023-09-02'
), owner_assignments AS (
  SELECT caseid__c AS case_id,
         COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE field__c = 'Owner') AS owner_change_events
  FROM casehistory__c
  GROUP BY caseid__c
), not_transferred_cases AS (
  SELECT b.*
  FROM base_cases b
  LEFT JOIN owner_assignments oa ON oa.case_id = b.case_id
  WHERE COALESCE(oa.owner_change_events, 0) <= 1
), per_agent AS (
  SELECT close_owner_id AS agent_id,
         COUNT(*) AS cases_closed,
         AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closeddate - createddate))) AS avg_handle_seconds
  FROM not_transferred_cases
  GROUP BY close_owner_id
  HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
)
SELECT agent_id
FROM per_agent
ORDER BY avg_handle_seconds ASC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 1;

    AND createddate < DATE '2023-09-02'
), owner_assignments AS (
  SELECT caseid__c AS case_id,
         COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE field__c = 'Owner') AS owner_change_events

args.query:
WITH base_cases AS (
  SELECT id AS case_id,
         ownerid AS close_owner_id,
         createddate::timestamp AS created_ts,
         closeddate::timestamp AS closed_ts
  FROM "Case"
  WHERE closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND createddate::timestamp >= TIMESTAMP '2023-05-02'
    AND createddate::timestamp < TIMESTAMP '2023-09-02'
), owner_assignments AS (
  SELECT caseid__c AS case_id,
         COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE field__c = 'Owner') AS owner_change_events
  FROM casehistory__c
  GROUP BY caseid__c
), not_transferred_cases AS (
  SELECT b.case_id, b.close_owner_id, b.created_ts, b.closed_ts
  FROM base_cases b
  LEFT JOIN owner_assignments oa ON oa.case_id = b.case_id
  WHERE COALESCE(oa.owner_change_events, 0) <= 1
), per_agent AS (
  SELECT close_owner_id AS agent_id,
         COUNT(*) AS cases_closed,
         AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_ts - created_ts))) AS avg_handle_seconds
  FROM not_transferred_cases
  GROUP BY close_owner_id
  HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
)
SELECT agent_id
FROM per_agent
ORDER BY avg_handle_seconds ASC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 1;

WITH base_cases AS (
  SELECT id AS case_id,
         ownerid AS close_owner_id,
         createddate::timestamp AS created_ts,
         closeddate::timestamp AS closed_ts
  FROM "Case"
  WHERE closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND createddate::timestamp >= TIMESTAMP '2023-05-02'
    AND createddate::timestamp < TIMESTAMP '2023-09-02'
), owner_assignments AS (
  SELECT caseid__c AS case_id,
         COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE field__c = 'Owner') AS owner_change_events
  FROM casehistory__c
  GROUP BY caseid__c
), not_transferred_cases AS (
  SELECT b.case_id, b.close_owner_id, b.created_ts, b.closed_ts
  FROM base_cases b
  LEFT JOIN owner_assignments oa ON oa.case_id = b.case_id
  WHERE COALESCE(oa.owner_change_events, 0) <= 1
), per_agent AS (
  SELECT close_owner_id AS agent_id,
         COUNT(*) AS cases_closed,
         AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_ts - created_ts))) AS avg_handle_seconds
  FROM not_transferred_cases
  GROUP BY close_owner_id
  HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
)
SELECT agent_id
FROM per_agent
ORDER BY avg_handle_seconds ASC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 1;

args.query:
WITH base_cases AS (
  SELECT id AS case_id,
         ownerid AS close_owner_id,
         createddate::timestamp AS created_ts,
         closeddate::timestamp AS closed_ts
  FROM "Case"
  WHERE closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND createddate::timestamp >= TIMESTAMP '2023-05-02'
    AND createddate::timestamp < TIMESTAMP '2023-09-02'
), owner_events AS (
  SELECT caseid__c AS case_id,
         COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE field__c = 'Owner') AS owner_change_events
  FROM casehistory__c
  GROUP BY caseid__c
), not_transferred_cases AS (
  SELECT b.case_id, b.close_owner_id, b.created_ts, b.closed_ts,
         COALESCE(oe.owner_change_events,0) AS owner_change_events
  FROM base_cases b
  LEFT JOIN owner_events oe ON oe.case_id = b.case_id
  WHERE COALESCE(oe.owner_change_events,0) <= 1
)
SELECT close_owner_id AS agent_id,
       COUNT(*) AS cases_closed,
       AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_ts - created_ts))) AS avg_handle_seconds
FROM not_transferred_cases
GROUP BY close_owner_id
ORDER BY cases_closed DESC
LIMIT 20;

WITH base_cases AS (

         ownerid AS close_owner_id,

    AND createddate::timestamp >= TIMESTAMP '2023-05-02'
    AND createddate::timestamp < TIMESTAMP '2023-09-02'

  SELECT caseid__c AS case_id,
         COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE field__c = 'Owner') AS owner_change_events
  FROM casehistory__c
  GROUP BY caseid__c
), not_transferred_cases AS (
  SELECT b.case_id, b.close_owner_id, b.created_ts, b.closed_ts,
         COALESCE(oe.owner_change_events,0) AS owner_change_events
  FROM base_cases b
  LEFT JOIN owner_events oe ON oe.case_id = b.case_id
  WHERE COALESCE(oe.owner_change_events,0) <= 1
)
SELECT close_owner_id AS agent_id,
       COUNT(*) AS cases_closed,
       AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_ts - created_ts))) AS avg_handle_seconds
FROM not_transferred_cases
GROUP BY close_owner_id
ORDER BY cases_closed DESC
LIMIT 20;

args.query:
WITH base_cases AS (
  SELECT id AS case_id,
         ownerid AS close_owner_id,
         createddate::timestamp AS created_ts,
         closeddate::timestamp AS closed_ts
  FROM "Case"
  WHERE closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND createddate::timestamp >= TIMESTAMP '2023-05-02'
    AND createddate::timestamp < TIMESTAMP '2023-09-02'
), owner_events AS (
  SELECT caseid__c AS case_id,
         COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE field__c = 'Owner') AS owner_change_events
  FROM casehistory__c
  GROUP BY caseid__c
), not_transferred_cases AS (
  SELECT b.case_id, b.close_owner_id, b.created_ts, b.closed_ts
  FROM base_cases b
  LEFT JOIN owner_events oe ON oe.case_id = b.case_id
  WHERE COALESCE(oe.owner_change_events,0) <= 1
), agent_case_counts AS (
  SELECT COALESCE(TRIM(LEADING '#' FROM oldvalue__c), TRIM(LEADING '#' FROM newvalue__c)) AS agent_id,
         COUNT(DISTINCT caseid__c) AS cases_touched
  FROM casehistory__c
  WHERE field__c = 'Owner'
  GROUP BY 1
), per_agent AS (
  SELECT ntc.close_owner_id AS agent_id,
         AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (ntc.closed_ts - ntc.created_ts))) AS avg_handle_seconds
  FROM not_transferred_cases ntc
  JOIN agent_case_counts acc
    ON TRIM(LEADING '#' FROM ntc.close_owner_id) = acc.agent_id
  WHERE acc.cases_touched > 1
  GROUP BY ntc.close_owner_id
)
SELECT agent_id
FROM per_agent
ORDER BY avg_handle_seconds ASC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 1;

exec_args.sql:
WITH base_cases AS (
  SELECT id AS case_id,
         ownerid AS close_owner_id,
         createddate::timestamp AS created_ts,
         closeddate::timestamp AS closed_ts
  FROM "Case"
  WHERE closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND createddate::timestamp >= TIMESTAMP '2023-05-02'
    AND createddate::timestamp < TIMESTAMP '2023-09-02'
), owner_events AS (
  SELECT caseid__c AS case_id,
         COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE field__c = 'Owner') AS owner_change_events
  FROM casehistory__c
  GROUP BY caseid__c
), not_transferred_cases AS (
  SELECT b.case_id, b.close_owner_id, b.created_ts, b.closed_ts
  FROM base_cases b
  LEFT JOIN owner_events oe ON oe.case_id = b.case_id
  WHERE COALESCE(oe.owner_change_events,0) <= 1
), agent_case_counts AS (
  SELECT COALESCE(TRIM(LEADING '#' FROM oldvalue__c), TRIM(LEADING '#' FROM newvalue__c)) AS agent_id,
         COUNT(DISTINCT caseid__c) AS cases_touched
  FROM casehistory__c
  WHERE field__c = 'Owner'
  GROUP BY 1
), per_agent AS (
  SELECT ntc.close_owner_id AS agent_id,
         AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (ntc.closed_ts - ntc.created_ts))) AS avg_handle_seconds
  FROM not_transferred_cases ntc
  JOIN agent_case_counts acc
    ON TRIM(LEADING '#' FROM ntc.close_owner_id) = acc.agent_id
  WHERE acc.cases_touched > 1
  GROUP BY ntc.close_owner_id
)
SELECT agent_id
FROM per_agent
ORDER BY avg_handle_seconds ASC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 1;
